title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: redhat-cloud-client-configuration bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for redhat-cloud-client-configuration is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
affected_products: Red Hat Enterprise Linux for ARM 64
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for Power, little endian
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for IBM z Systems
Red Hat Enterprise Linux for x86_64 10 x86_64

fixes.description: [rhccc] We should use yggdrasil (not rhcd) on rhel-10
Fix redhat-cloud-client-configuration to support the new autoregistration v2 flow
[rhccc] yggdrasil* unit files should not refer rhcd

full_text:
An update for redhat-cloud-client-configuration is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
